text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's race, the Kikuka Sho, is the longest of
the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Long races are Gold Ship's forte, so I'd really like
to see her win this, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This is some darn good tea... And the autumn
leaves are looking lovely...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The way she's kicking back, you'd think she's here
for a leisurely vacation.
choice_data_list:
This is no time to relax! The race is about to
start!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. The best way to win a race is to go in
loose and relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'll be there just as soon as I finish my tea, don't
you worry. Oh, and by the way...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Can you pass me those rice crackers?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Relaxing might just be her way of getting ready
for the race, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Honestly, she's really stressing me out!
